sql.comment: question_concepts.concept_id used to store top-level concept names; repoint each row at the concept's numeric id (as a string) before the name column disappears. Rows that match no concept are left untouched.
sql.sql: UPDATE question_concepts qc SET concept_id = (SELECT CAST(MIN(c.id) AS VARCHAR(255)) FROM concepts c WHERE c.name = qc.concept_id) WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM concepts c WHERE c.name = qc.concept_id)
